svg.text: Build a sorted region left-to-right. Each new element slides into its correct position.
Save key first, then compare with sorted region right-to-left
key’s slot is now free for shifting
Yes → shift 5 right into the gap
Stop! Place key in the gap
Save key, then compare with sorted region right-to-left
No → stop! 8 is already in the right spot
5 is NOT larger than 8, so no shift needed
Key goes right back where it came from
0 shifts — best case for this element!
• Save the key, shift larger elements right — the gap travels left until the key finds its spot
• Worst case (reverse sorted): gap travels all the way to index 0 every time = O(n²)
• Best case (already sorted): zero shifts per element = O(n) — fastest quadratic sort on sorted data
